name: xule-site
description: Personal website - book aesthetic, algorithmic age

scripts.build: bun scripts/gen-og-cards.mjs && rm -rf _site && eleventy && bun scripts/check-og-images.mjs && bun scripts/check-renderings.mjs && bun test scripts/check-sitemap-redirects.test.mjs && bun scripts/check-sitemap-redirects.mjs && bunx pagefind --site _site && bash scripts/indexnow-submit.sh
